mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 0.3 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, which depress corporate earnings expectations and generate negative S&P 500 forward returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal or UNRATE declines without corresponding SPX losses.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts indicates strong aggregate demand, which drives corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days through 2024 Q2.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 over any 3-year window or 60-day returns in co-expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production signals robust manufacturing activity, which boosts corporate profits and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in high INDPRO regimes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or INDPRO declines without corresponding SPX losses.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2% annualized pressures central banks to tighten policy, which raises equity discount rates and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in high CPI regimes are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or CPI declines without corresponding SPX gains.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in payroll employment and declining unemployment rates signals a tightening labor market, which drives wage inflation and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 over any 3-year window or 5d returns in tight labor markets are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Post-recession recovery phases characterized by rising residential sales and GDP growth generate positive S&P 500 forward returns as investor confidence rebuilds over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in recovery regimes are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or both proxies decline without corresponding SPX losses.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden drop in industrial production signals supply chain disruptions, which raise input costs and generate negative S&P 500 forward returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in low INDPRO regimes are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or INDPRO rises without corresponding SPX losses.
